title: TempleDAO - REKT
relevance_summary: Unchecked migration in staking contract allowing arbitrary fund transfer

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls migrateStake() without validating oldStaking parameter
prevention.trigger: migrateStake() called with invalid oldStaking parameter

red_flags: Unchecked external contract input in critical function
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls migrateStake() without validating oldStaking parameter
summary: TempleDAO's StaxLPStaking contract had an unchecked external contract input in its migrateStake() function, allowing attackers to drain funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for invalid oldStaking parameters.
